APPROVE
Bead has no explicit acceptance criteria and is labeled `kind:investigation`; the diff delivers exactly what an investigation bead should: hypothesis confirmation with file:line citations, token/runtime evidence from both runs, cross-reference to the existing PIVOT-1 design doc, and four scoped follow-ups. The `no_changes_rationale.txt` correctly justifies why no code change belongs in this bead.
